data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for approval deadlines and escalation.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding 'Approval deadlines and escalation'. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm the implementation of this requirement. The linked use case describes a multi-party sign-off workflow but lacks specific details or endpoints that would demonstrate how approval deadlines and escalation are managed, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: Lack of evidence confirming the implementation of approval deadlines and escalation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the requirement for approval deadlines and escalation.
